caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses and a light-colored Nehru jacket over a matching shirt, stands behind a podium giving a speech. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green wall featuring a geometric, stepped relief pattern. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. Initially, he holds both hands open and outward; as the scene progresses, he brings his hands closer together, moving them in a rhythmic, explanatory motion. To his right, a tall, thin glass cylinder containing floral arrangements is partially visible. The background and his attire remain constant, while only his hand gestures and facial expressions shift as he delivers his address.
